title: Claude Code Leak: What's Happening?
summary: Jordan Urbs analyzes a Claude Code source code leak via a committed NPM .map file, discussing the TypeScript infrastructure, three-layer memory system, and implications for Anthropic including copyright concerns and token economics. The video argues that Claude Code is fundamentally a harness wrapping an LLM and explores open-source alternatives and local deployment strategies.
